source.exactText: Karakterimiz John, işlediği bir suçtan dolayı yaşadığı diyardan kaçmak adına uzaklara giden gemilerden birine gizlice biner.

shot.sceneBrief: Karakterimiz John, işlediği bir suçtan dolayı yaşadığı diyardan kaçmak adına uzaklara giden gemilerden birine gizlice biner.

mamiDirectives.text: Phase 0 preset: Sinematik Hikâye. Director thesis: Duyguyu reklam parlatmasıyla değil, gerçek mekan ve sinema grameriyle taşı. Locked decisions: Hikaye modu: Naturalist film — Deakins/Lubezki çizgisi: doğal ışık, uzun nefes. | Duygu yayı: Earned resolve — Yavaş inşa, sessiz güven, finalde rahatlama. Anti-generic guard: never produce a generic preset look; every frame must prove the selected strategy through source meaning, physical staging, motivated light, and the selected world/ref DNA.

world.renderPhysics: Fortiche painterly-3D hybrid rendering as developed by Fortiche Production for premium episodic animation. This is a precise formal system, not 'anime-ish' — the grammar is industrial European painterly, not Japanese: (1) FORMS: full 3D geometry, but surface shading is a painted oil-texture layer — brush strokes are visible at every silhouette edge, their direction following the form's curvature but inconsistently, as if a painter made deliberate choices rather than a renderer solving physics. (2) COLOUR LAW: there is no black anywhere in this world. The deepest shadow is a rich deep violet. Skin shadow is rosewood-plum, architectural shadow is indigo-violet, cloth shadow is aubergine. (3) HIGHLIGHTS: painted-in manually, NOT following physical light math exactly — highlight placement emphasizes the emotional reading of the form (the cheekbone lit even when key is behind the subject, the knuckle catching a gleam on the swing). (4) SURFACE SPECIFICITY: skin has painted-in blush and pore mark visible at close-up, not subsurface scattering. Hair reads as sculpted painted volume — individual strands are grouped into painted clumps, each clump receiving a single highlight stroke. Fabric shows woven texture painted, not cloth-sim. (5) ENVIRONMENT: chunky mid-poly architecture with surface painting of grime strata, rust oxidation pattern, and iridescent oil-slick streaks on wet stone — a deep-industrial undercity aesthetic of chemical-district grime, never any named franchise district. Every metal surface carries thin-film interference rainbow spec. Background compresses into painterly matte with visible brushwork — never crisp photographic detail, never clean CGI surface. (6) POST: Vision3 500T film stock emulation — warm-highlight / cool-shadow curve, halation blooming on any pixel above 90% luminance (light sources bloom into surrounding haze), subtle chromatic aberration at high-contrast silhouette edges, 35mm-equivalent grain floor present but refined. IMPERATIVE: FORTICHE PAINTERLY-3D HYBRID. 3D forms with hand-painted surface shading, 2D-animated FX layer on top. FORBID: flat cel shading, clean untextured CGI, photoreal live-action light math, standard anime eye geometry, pure black. No hard cel outline anywhere. Silhouette carries entirely through painted edge — the brush stroke itself IS the boundary, weight varies from 2px at low emotional intensity to 5px at high, direction follows the form. Interior 'lines' are painted shadow steps: a steep value jump that reads as line at distance but resolves to brushwork at close. Shadow-side rim is painted deep violet, not inked. Effects layer (energy, fire, sparks) has its own distinct loose calligraphic brush contour that contrasts with the controlled character silhouette.
world.figurePhysics: No hard cel outline anywhere. Silhouette carries entirely through painted edge — the brush stroke itself IS the boundary, weight varies from 2px at low emotional intensity to 5px at high, direction follows the form. Interior 'lines' are painted shadow steps: a steep value jump that reads as line at distance but resolves to brushwork at close. Shadow-side rim is painted deep violet, not inked. Effects layer (energy, fire, sparks) has its own distinct loose calligraphic brush contour that contrasts with the controlled character silhouette.
world.environmentPhysics: Single motivated key direction — warm industrial lantern, cool exterior moon, neon-adjacent accent from a painted window. Bounce fill is in the key's complementary hue from the palette: magenta key bounces teal fill, teal key bounces magenta fill. Rim accent color is always from the palette's jewel-tone (never white, never warm neutral). Ambient occlusion is painted soft and warm-dark, never a hard black AO contact shadow. Halation blooms on all practical sources in frame. Painted indirect-light from windows and lamps bleeds warm halos onto proximate geometry.
world.cameraEnvelope: 35mm to 50mm portrait range. f/2.8 character close-up, f/4 mid-shot, f/5.6 wide establisher. Vision3 500T characteristic curve: warm highlight (+15 orange shift above 70% luminance), cool shadow (cyan push below 30%), halation blooming on anything above 90% luminance. 35mm grain floor present and refined. Mild chromatic aberration (1-2px lateral shift at silhouette). No anamorphic streak. 1.78:1 or 2.00:1 aspect. 35-50mm portrait staging with a painted 3D weight: the character close-up carved out of a deep, softly falling background. The camera commits to one bold, deliberate move — a slow push onto the decisive gesture, a lateral track through the layers — then holds while the paint settles. Frame at the character's own height; the world is dense around them, never above them. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a top-down vantage.
world.lightPhysics: Single motivated key direction — warm industrial lantern, cool exterior moon, neon-adjacent accent from a painted window. Bounce fill is in the key's complementary hue from the palette: magenta key bounces teal fill, teal key bounces magenta fill. Rim accent color is always from the palette's jewel-tone (never white, never warm neutral). Ambient occlusion is painted soft and warm-dark, never a hard black AO contact shadow. Halation blooms on all practical sources in frame. Painted indirect-light from windows and lamps bleeds warm halos onto proximate geometry.
world.materialPhysics: World-compatible materials: notebook_ink. Material only colours a non-real register; the world's own surface law governs.
negativeLock: NO Jinx, NO Vi, NO Caitlyn, NO Jayce, NO Viktor, NO Silco, NO Ekko, NO Heimerdinger, NO Vander, NO Powder, NO any named Arcane character
NO Piltover, NO Zaun, NO Undercity, NO Hexgate, NO The Last Drop, NO Piltover Academy, NO any named Arcane location
NO Hextech crystal (blue glowing gem device), NO shimmer substance (iridescent purple glow serum)
NO pure black anywhere in the frame — deepest shadow is deep violet
NO hard cel outline, NO standard anime flat-color shading
NO earth green, NO pure orange (flame accent excepted), NO sepia-brown palette
NOT anime — this is European industrial painterly, NOT Japanese animation grammar
Turkish label only — hand-painted brush lettering with visible uneven stroke edge, NO English signage
world.paletteAsLight: Palette light: near-black cool indigo, bright cool teal, vivid warm red, near-white warm ivory — palette character: deep-violet shadow + jewel-teal mid + magenta-pink accent + warm-cream highlight. Thin-film rainbow spec on all metal. Grime palette: rust-orange, oxidized copper, oil-slick iridescent (context-dependent). Render these as light behaviour, never flat fills.

refs.name: Fortiche Painted Texture Grammar
refs.directive: Stylized animation frame in the Fortiche Production painterly-3D doctrine ( season 1 and 2). Medium/era: 2021–2024 Fortiche hybrid — 3D-modeled forms surface-shaded with oil-paint texture hand-applied at every silhouette edge. Named anchor: Fortiche impasto 2D-over-3D surface treatment — NOT anime, NOT cel — paint stroke IS the shading method. Signature light: motivated single-direction key; bounce fill in complementary hue (if key is teal, fill is magenta-pink; if key is warm amber, fill is cool violet); rim light is always an accent color, NEVER white; hard-black ambient occlusion forbidden — AOcclusion is painterly-soft in shadow-hue, not black. Color/grade: Fortiche Vision3 500T-derived curve — warm-highlight, cool-shadow, painterly halation on hot pixels; deep-violet for the darkest shadow value (NO pure black anywhere); magenta-pink + teal two-color system in the painted shadows and rims. Lens/optics: 35–50mm, f/2.8–f/4; Vision3 500T halation on specular and emissive sources; 35mm-equivalent grain present in every value step, not in the highlights only. Texture/render: visible brush stroke at every silhouette edge; skin has hand-painted blush and pore work, NOT subsurface-scattering smooth; hair masses show individual paint-stroke separation, not smooth spec; highlights are painted-in decisions, not PBR physical math. Composition+motion: deliberate 24fps with hand-animated painted smear frames at peak action (2–3 frames, motion-streak painted); 1.5–2s emotional hold; slow-in slow-out with weight; no motion-blur.

refs.name: Undercity Value-Tension Grammar
refs.directive: Stylized animation frame in the Fortiche painterly-3D undercity-tension lineage (painted-3D grammar, original subjects only). Medium/era: Fortiche impasto 2D-over-3D, industrial-undercity register. Named anchor: undercity value-tension grammar — the deep-industrial chemical-district atmosphere of grime, oxidation, and iridescent oil-slick, held in painterly value contrast. Signature light: motivated single-direction key from a warm industrial lantern or a cool exterior, complementary-hue bounce, a jewel-tone accent rim; halation blooms on practicals; painterly-soft warm AO, no hard black. Color/grade: Fortiche warm-highlight/cool-shadow curve, deep-violet darkest shadow (no pure black), magenta-and-teal rim system; a grime palette of rust-orange, oxidized copper, and oil-slick iridescence on wet stone. Lens/optics: 35-50mm, f/2.8-f/4, halation on emissive sources, refined 35mm grain in every value step, 1-2px chromatic aberration at high-contrast silhouettes. Texture/render: visible oil-paint brush stroke at every silhouette, chunky mid-poly industrial architecture surface-painted with grime strata and thin-film rainbow spec on metal; painterly matte background. Composition+motion: deliberate 24fps with painted smear frames at peak, momentum carrying through cloth and hair after impact, a 1.5-2s value-charged emotional hold; the industrial value-tension is the mood.

refs.name: Bridge Scale Grammar
refs.directive: Stylized animation frame in the Fortiche painterly-3D monumental-scale lineage (painted-3D grammar, original subjects only). Medium/era: Fortiche impasto 2D-over-3D, grand-architecture register. Named anchor: painterly bridge-scale grammar — the monumental ornate structure spanning a divide, painterly grandeur against atmospheric depth. Signature light: motivated key raking the vast structure, warm practical lanterns and cool sky in balance, halation on the light sources, painterly-soft AO in the architectural depth. Color/grade: Fortiche warm-highlight/cool-shadow curve, deep-violet shadow (no black), jewel-tone accent rim; a grand palette of warm-stone ornament against a cool-atmospheric sky. Lens/optics: 35-50mm to wide, f/4-f/5.6 deep enough to hold the architecture, atmospheric painterly depth compressing the far span into brushwork; halation on distant lights. Texture/render: visible brush stroke at silhouettes, chunky mid-poly ornate architecture surface-painted with grime and gilt detail, painterly matte far-ground, thin-film spec on metal ornament. Composition+motion: monumental scale composition — a figure small against a vast ornate span, the structure filling the frame, slow reveal of grandeur; a painterly smear on any motion, a held awe-of-scale beat.
